title: Multiple department printers offline

servicenow_seed.description: Four callers from the same floor report all department printers offline and not accepting jobs.

correct_steps: Check related incidents for duplicate printer reports
Confirm multiple printers and users are affected
Escalate to Desktop Support Tier 2 with scope and affected printers
rationale: Multiple related tickets indicate an outage pattern. Do not resolve each individually.

tool_clues.print_server: Print server queue not responding for PRN-FLOOR3-*.
